face legal troubles, will be duped by others and thus get into trouble. Jupiter
is in own house. This endows the native with devotion to God. The native will
have brothers and sisters.
As Saturn contacts Mars in sign of Venus, the native will deal in
machinery and beautiful materials. But, as Saturn is hemmed·in between
malefics, the native will face troubles from friends and workers whom he
trusts. As Saturn contacts Venus and Mercury, both friends, later the native
will earn in various ways.
Just after 30, when Saturn contacts Mars, the native will _face opposition
and quarrels from his-brother (Mars has Mercury ahead and Saturn behind

IMKRTANT CHARTS 239
both inimical to him). When Saturn moves away from Libra, good times dawn
for the native as Saturn contacts both Mercury and Venus who are friends. As
Saturn has the aspect of Jupiter who is strongly placed in his own house, the
native will show offhimselfas a big man. Whatever and as much he would
